text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While out running errands one day, I spot Tokai
Teio and Symboli Rudolf.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Well? What do you think of the limited edition
honeyade? It's delicious, right?!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hm. It goes down much more easily than I
imagined. It's not cloyingly sweet—it's just right.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! They're using the best honey too, which is
perfect when you want an energy boost. ♪ Ooh,
and—

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Seeing how energized you are, I have no
doubt about the drink's efficaciousness.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
How about we find a place to sit, so we can talk
more about the drink's hidden benefits?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Wait, really? Yeah, I'd love to!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hold up! That's not what I meant! I promised I'd
take the lead on our outing today, remember?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Ah! Haha, so you did. Pardon me, Teio. I put
myself in your capable hands.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Let's play a shooter! It's not every day you get to
do something like this, right?!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You'll feel your cares getting blown to
smithereens with each shot!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, that's fine by me. You've got more
experience with shooting than I do, so show me
the ropes.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Ngh, you think you can run? Then how about
this?!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Whoooa! Way to go, Prez! That was a rare enemy!
They're super hard to take down!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's not too difficult. It may look tough, but a
foe like that can be taken down with a single
blow... Oh! Another one's coming from the right,
Teio!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Phew... We worked up a sweat. I can see why
you're so captivated by that game.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Really? I'm glad you liked it!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
It's just, I wasn't planning on making you run around so
much...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Hm? Did you say something?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I said we should head to the outlook next! I could
really use a place to just chill out!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Phew... The breeze feels great. This is the perfect
place to sit back and relax.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Sounds like a great idea! Time to sloth it up. After
all, there's no one here but us!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: These documents... Did you put them together?!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Yes, I did. They were a priority task, right? I
heard you had something else on your docket,
and I had time on my hands, so I took the liberty
of—

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: There you go. AGAIN!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I keep telling you! If you continue to take on
every task you come across, you'll wear yourself
out!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I-I'm lucky to always have you looking out for me!
However, it seems that breaking this bad habit of
mine is easier said than done...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: (Knock, knock. Click.)

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Heya, Prez! Got any plans for next weekend?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: ...So that's what you meant by taking the lead.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Huh? Something the matter?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I'm fine. I was just thinking that my heart is at
ease, as though I'm floating sybaritically on the
breeze.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Now that I think about it, it's been so long since
I've taken a moment to just enjoy the here and
now.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I feel rejuvenated thanks to you, Tokai Teio.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
What did I tell you? I'm pretty good at this whole
event planning thing, if I do say so myself!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
That's why I want you to count on me a little more
from here on out... No! A looot more! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I keep running into these two wherever I go
today. But as their words float into my ears, I feel
my heart warm.
